headlines.title: Heat Dome Broils the Western U.S.
headlines.summary: A ridge of high pressure fueled record-breaking temperatures in Montana, Utah, and Wyoming on July 12, 2026.

headlines.title: NASA Invites Media to Serbia Artemis Accords Signing Ceremony
headlines.summary: The Republic of Serbia will sign the Artemis Accords at 5 p.m. EDT Thursday, July 16, during a ceremony at NASA Headquarters in Washington. NASA Deputy Administrator Matt Anderson will host Serbia’s Minister of Foreign A
